summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Le Marche e-commerce platform. Admin authentication flow now working perfectly (fixed from previous iteration). All major e-commerce features functional including cart, search, and admin dashboard. Minor routing issues identified for registration page.

minor_bugs.issue: No routes matched location '/register' - registration page route not configured
Cart icon in header not easily clickable - users need to navigate to /cart directly

passed_tests: Admin login with admin@lemarche.com / admin123 successful
Admin dashboard access via navigation menu working
Admin dashboard stats display (18 products, 1 order, 2 users, ₹3,897 revenue)
Admin products and orders tabs switching
Add Product button and dialog functionality
Product management table with edit/delete buttons
Products page loads with 18 products in grid layout
Product detail page navigation and display
Add to Cart functionality working (cart count updates)
Shopping cart page displays items correctly
Cart quantity controls (+ and - buttons)
Cart remove item functionality
Order summary calculation (subtotal, delivery, total)
Login to Checkout button present
Search functionality working (search for 'cheese' returns 1 result)
Search results filtering and display
Category filtering interface present
Homepage hero section and navigation
Products page accessible via /products route
Admin order management (1 order found in admin panel)
Responsive design and layout
Product images loading correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Add registration page route (/register) and improve cart icon navigation in header for better UX. Consider adding direct cart icon click functionality.
